task: TD-02 ability-first source audit and byte lock

policy.native_hant_count: quality-gated actual; no target, minimum, refill, or lower-quality backfill
policy.deduplication: NFC/casefold exact plus punctuation-symbol-insensitive near identity across all candidates
policy.written_cantonese: hard reject; UD Cantonese-HK was not downloaded or admitted

explicit_exclusions.hplt3-tokenizer-train-zho_Hant: deterministic random audit exposed SEO/loan spam, unrelated concatenation, historical-classical text, and register mixing without source-level provenance
explicit_exclusions.hplt3-tokenizer-train-non-Hant: TD-03 boundary audit also exposed marketing fragments, web concatenation, and loan SEO; all HPLT sides remain tokenizer provenance only
explicit_exclusions.hkel-current-legislation: 3873 candidates passed per-record gates but zero survived the deterministic cross-source 20 percent legal-domain ceiling
explicit_exclusions.generic-zh-or-cmn: cannot prove zho_Hans versus zho_Hant identity
explicit_exclusions.cantonese: separate language outside the five-tag and 20-route MVP scope
